title: Good Diagraming Tool for Monday at the Item Level
excerpt: I am using a board to manage use cases. Rather than importing diagrams from another tool such as draw.io or Visio I want to imbed a BPMN (or others) diagram at the item level for each use case item so I can edit the diag…

posts.author: perrymcleod (Perry McLeod)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using a board to manage use cases. Rather than importing diagrams from another tool such as draw.io or Visio I want to imbed a BPMN (or others) diagram at the item level for each use case item so I can edit the diagram from within Monday, track changes, and communicate with team members. I have looked at a few options but they only seem to rely on markup languages like weweave’s “Mermaid Charts & Diagrams” app. Gliffy is a great choice; however, it only imbeds at the board level. Adding a new view for each diagram is not a useful workaround. Can someone suggest a solution for me? You can email me directly at pmcleod@compugen.com if your answer is too complex for this mode. Thank you, in advance.
